use_cases: Display hierarchical file or folder structures in file explorers
Navigate and organize project directories in code editors
Select and interact with nested items in document management systems
Build tree-based navigation menus for settings or configuration pages
Represent organizational hierarchies in content management systems
ai_summary: A hierarchical file tree component that displays expandable folder and file nodes with selection states. Supports click-to-expand folders, item selection, and keyboard navigation (Enter/Space). Renders with chevron indicators for folders and folder/file icons, using a clean flat visual style with hover and active states.
